Due to the forecasted winter storm and in order to allow staff adequate time to safely clear parking lots, pathways, and other areas, all DCR Visitor Centers statewide will be closed to the public on Sunday, January 25 and Monday, January 26.

⏳Hours of Operation Update⌛️
Beginning Sunday January 25th, 2026, Walden Pond will be closing at 5PM daily.
All vehicles must exit by gate closing at 5:30PM.
The boat ramp parking area will remain closed.
Due to the pending winter storm, Walden Pond Visitor Center will be closed on Monday, February 23, 2026 per Department of Conservation and Recreation (DCR) advisory.

⏳Hours of Operation Update⌛️
Beginning Sunday March 8th, Walden Pond will be closing at 6:30PM daily. 
All vehicles must exit by gate closing at 7PM. 
The boat ramp parking area will remain closed.
The Boat Ramp at Walden Pond will open for the season on Wednesday April 1st at 5am. The gate will unlock automatically.

BOAT RAMP UPDATE:
Tomorrow, Thursday April 2, 2026, the boat ramp will be closed for the duration of the day to accommodate ongoing construction work.  We apologize for the inconvenience.  The boat ramp is expected to reopen the following day, Friday April 3rd.

⏳Hours of Operation Update⌛️
Beginning today, Sunday April 5th, 2026 Walden Pond will be opened 7AM-7PM.
All vehicles must exit by gate closing at 7:30PM.
The boat ramp is open daily 5AM-7PM.

⏳Hours of Operation Update ⌛️
Beginning Sunday, May 3rd, 2026 Walden Pond State Reservation hours will be 7:00AM - 7:30PM
The main exit gate will lock promptly at 8:00PM
Boat ramp access will be 5:00AM - 7:30PM

⏳Hours of Operation Update⌛️
Beginning Sunday, May 17th Walden Pond will be opening at 5AM daily.
New park hours will be 5AM-7:30PM.
All vehicles must exit boat ramp parking lot by 7:30PM.
All vehicles must exit main lot by 8PM.
Parking fees apply from open to close, year round.
